properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Hitch is not unlocked with this skin. Hitch can only be unlocked by signing up for our newsletter through the main menu.

backstory.original: Hitch started off life on the wrong foot and the wrong side of the wagon tracks. Besides the Sword Coast, the only other place he's ever called home is Durpar in Southeast Faerûn, which has been conquered by goblinoids allied with Durpar's ruling merchant house. Now, he tries to keep two steps ahead of his shady past, avoiding run-ins with the Zhentarim and other nefarious acquaintances. With his quick wit and roguish charm, Hitch plans to somehow land on his feet, on a pile of gold, with a treasure map in each hand, but until then he needs all the friends he can get.
backstory.display: 希契在充满苦难的贫民区长大。除了剑湾，他唯一称得上是家的地方是费伦东南部的都帕，那里已经被都帕最大的商行和地精所征服。现在，他试图与他不光彩的过去保持距离，避免与散塔林会和其他邪恶的熟人发生冲突。凭借他的聪明才智和无赖魅力，希契计划以某种方式摆脱目前的困境，过上自己想要的日子。但在那之前，他得先去召集他能找到的所有朋友。

description.original: Hitch stabs the nearest target in the face. Ouch!
description.display: 希契刺向距离最近的目标脸部。哎哟！

description.original: Hitch disappears into the shadows and brutally backstabs the five furthest enemies.
description.display: 希契消失在阴影中，然后残忍地背刺距离最远的 5 名敌人。

longDescription.original: Hitch disappears into the shadows and reappears behind the furthest enemy, whom he stabs. He then repeats this for the next four furthest enemies, if applicable.
longDescription.display: 希契消失在阴影中，随后在距离最远的敌人身后重新出现，并使用背刺攻击该敌人。如果还有敌人，他会依次对距离最远的另外 4 名敌人重复此攻击。

description.desc: Increase the damage of Champions by $amount% if their charisma score is 14 or higher.
魅力 14 或以上的勇士提升 $amount% 伤害

tipText.original: Hitch increases the damage of Champions with high Charisma scores. Use Champions with high scores to increase their damage.
tipText.display: 希契使高魅力勇士的伤害提高。使用高魅力勇士以提高其伤害。

description.desc: Adds a thrown Dagger to Hitch's Base Attack
在希契的基本攻击中加入一把飞刀

tipText.original: Hitch somehow always has a spare dagger up his sleeve, and will toss it at a random enemy before he attacks.
tipText.display: 希契总在袖子里藏一把备用匕首，并在发动攻击前扔向一名随机敌人。

description.desc: Hitch's Daggers have a $hitch_ricochet_chance% chance to ricochet to another enemy (up to $limit times), granting 1 stack, with each stack increasing the effect of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $amount___2% (Stacks decay by 10% every 10 seconds)^^$hitch_ricochet_reduction_time
希契的小刀有 $hitch_ricochet_chance% 几率弹向另一名敌人 （最多不超过 $limit 次），并获得一层堆叠。每层堆叠都会提升$(upgrade_name id___2)的效果 $amount___2%（堆叠层数每 10 秒衰减 10%）^^$hitch_ricochet_reduction_time

specializationDescription.original: Hitch always has yet another spare dagger to toss, thus increasing the number of daggers he throws before attacking.
specializationDescription.display: 希契还有一把可以投掷的备用匕首，从而增加了发动攻击前投掷的匕首数量。

specializationDescription.original: Hitch spends more time chatting with interesting people, further increasing the damage of your Champions with a high charisma score.
specializationDescription.display: 希契花费更多时间与有趣的勇士聊天，从而使高魅力勇士的伤害进一步提高。

description.original: I can take a backseat if you'll lead the way.
description.display: 如果你来指挥，我可以退居幕后。

description.original: Come on, charge or whatever!
description.display: 来吧，管他冲锋还是什么！

description.original: I've always go another one, too.
description.display: 我也总是瞄准另一个。

description.original: Careful, you might lose an eye.
description.display: 小心，你可能会失去一只眼。

description.original: Boi-yoing!
description.display: 弹！

description.original: You hold 'em, I'll drop 'em!
description.display: 你抓住，我放下！

description.original: This is getting ridiculous.
description.display: 这太荒唐了。

description.original: Pleased to meet you, too!
description.display: 我也很高兴认识你！

description.original: Have you seen my other dagger?
description.display: 你看到我的另一把匕首了吗？

description.original: I am going to go SO FAST!
description.display: 我会跑得超快！

effects.description: Hitch also counts as a Centaur

description.original: You guys do your thing. I'll be supervising from over here.
description.display: 你们忙你们的。我在这边监督。

description.original: Fits a moderate amount of gold pieces.
description.display: 可以容纳一定数量的金币。

description.original: It doesn't look like much, but it can store quite a bit of loot.
description.display: 虽然看起来不咋地，但其实能存放挺多的战利品。

description.original: Why have one pouch when you could have five?
description.display: 五个袋子比一个袋子强得多。

name.original: Burglar's Pack of the Sneaky Thief

description.original: It's got everything you need to pillage and pilfer.
description.display: 里头有小偷所需用到的一切工具。

description.original: I really ought to sharpen this one.
description.display: 得抽空磨一磨这匕首了。

description.original: I really ought to clean this one.
description.display: 得抽空清洗下它了。

description.original: Everything's better with a little gold added in.
description.display: 只要添加点黄金一切都变得更美好了。

description.original: Stolen from a foolish Prince from the east.
description.display: 这是从某位来自东方的鲁莽王子身上偷来的。

description.original: Hey! My mother knit these for me.
description.display: 喂！这可是我妈亲手做给我的。

description.original: I think a spider crawled inside these and webbed them up.
description.display: 似乎是有蜘蛛爬进去织网了。

description.original: I can scale all but the slipperiest surfaces.
description.display: 我穿着它可以攀爬几乎所有类型的墙面。

description.original: Useful for climbing giants and other extra tall creatures.
description.display: 适合用来攀爬巨人或巨型生物。

description.original: It was just hanging in the cloakroom of this Inn...
description.display: 当时披肩就那样挂在酒馆的衣帽间里......

description.original: I'll give it back when I'm done with it, I swear.
description.display: 等我用完后就会还回去，我发誓。

description.original: It's impressive, much like myself!
description.display: 简直是一披惊人，就像我一样！

description.original: It never gets tangled in my legs.
description.display: 它从不会缠住我的脚。

description.original: The peddler swore it was real!
description.display: 那位行商信誓旦旦说这是真品！

description.original: There's a story behind this ring that I'll tell you some time.
description.display: 这枚戒指背后是有段故事的，改日我再告诉你。

description.original: That's 100% legitimate Icewind Crystal.
description.display: 这是百分百纯净的冰风谷水晶。

description.original: You can't hide your true form from me.
description.display: 在我眼前就乖乖露出原型吧。

description.original: A simple rod of copper. Useful for jimmying doors and windows.
description.display: 简易的铜质权杖。适合用来撬门和窗。

description.original: It's the fanciest thing I've ever jimmied a window with.
description.display: 这是我所使用过最精致的撬窗口工具。

description.original: It has some small magical properties that makes it quite useful.
description.display: 里头还蕴含着少量魔力的实用武器。

description.original: Magically enhanced to ignore the laws of physics.
description.display: 通过魔法强化的权杖，能够忽视物理定律。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Hitch started off life on the wrong foot and the wrong side of the wagon tracks. Besides the Sword Coast, the only other place he's ever called home is Durpar in Southeast Faerûn, which has been conquered by goblinoids allied with Durpar's ruling merchant house. Now, he tries to keep two steps ahead of his shady past, avoiding run-ins with the Zhentarim and other nefarious acquaintances. With his quick wit and roguish charm, Hitch plans to somehow land on his feet, on a pile of gold, with a treasure map in each hand, but until then he needs all the friends he can get.

original.name: Sticky Slippers

display.name: 黏糊的凉鞋
display.description: 似乎是有蜘蛛爬进去织网了。

original.name: Sticky Boots
original.description: I can scale all but the slipperiest surfaces.

display.name: 黏糊的靴子
display.description: 我穿着它可以攀爬几乎所有类型的墙面。

original.name: Boots of Spider Climbing
original.description: Useful for climbing giants and other extra tall creatures.

display.name: 蜘蛛爬靴子
display.description: 适合用来攀爬巨人或巨型生物。

original.name: Pilfered Cape
original.description: It was just hanging in the cloakroom of this Inn...

display.name: 偷来的披肩
display.description: 当时披肩就那样挂在酒馆的衣帽间里......

original.name: Borrowed Cape
original.description: I'll give it back when I'm done with it, I swear.

display.name: 借来的披肩
display.description: 等我用完后就会还回去，我发誓。

original.name: Impressive Cape
original.description: It's impressive, much like myself!

display.name: 惊人的披肩
display.description: 简直是一披惊人，就像我一样！

original.name: Magnificent Cape of Free Flowing
original.description: It never gets tangled in my legs.

display.name: 高贵的流动披肩
display.description: 它从不会缠住我的脚。

original.name: Dull Dagger
original.description: I really ought to sharpen this one.

display.name: 迟钝的匕首
display.description: 得抽空磨一磨这匕首了。

original.name: Bloody Dagger
original.description: I really ought to clean this one.

display.name: 染血的匕首
display.description: 得抽空清洗下它了。

original.name: Golden Dagger
original.description: Everything's better with a little gold added in.

display.name: 黄金匕首
display.description: 只要添加点黄金一切都变得更美好了。

original.name: Ornate Dagger of Princes
original.description: Stolen from a foolish Prince from the east.

display.name: 华丽的王子匕首
display.description: 这是从某位来自东方的鲁莽王子身上偷来的。

original.description: The peddler swore it was real!

display.name: 赝品戒指

original.name: Pearl Ring
original.description: There's a story behind this ring that I'll tell you some time.

display.name: 珍珠戒指
display.description: 这枚戒指背后是有段故事的，改日我再告诉你。

original.name: Crystal Ring
original.description: That's 100% legitimate Icewind Crystal.

display.name: 水晶戒指
display.description: 这是百分百纯净的冰风谷水晶。

original.name: Zhentarim Ring of True Sight
original.description: You can't hide your true form from me.

display.name: 散塔林会的真视戒指
display.description: 在我眼前就乖乖露出原型吧。

original.name: Copper Rod
original.description: A simple rod of copper. Useful for jimmying doors and windows.

display.name: 铜质权杖
display.description: 简易的铜质权杖。适合用来撬门和窗。

original.name: Fancy Rod
original.description: It's the fanciest thing I've ever jimmied a window with.

display.name: 精致权杖
display.description: 这是我所使用过最精致的撬窗口工具。

original.name: Static Rod
original.description: It has some small magical properties that makes it quite useful.

display.name: 静电权杖
display.description: 里头还蕴含着少量魔力的实用武器。

original.name: Ancient Immovable Rod
original.description: Magically enhanced to ignore the laws of physics.

display.name: 古老的固定权杖
display.description: 通过魔法强化的权杖，能够忽视物理定律。
